title: Speaking
surface: Speaker bio + active lecture modules + headshots + request-deployment CTA — a high-fidelity speaker kit
summary: Stitch-generated surface that is not in the v2 plan at all. Not a publication surface — a professional booking page. Disposition pending: keep in scope as identity-cluster sub-page, spin off to separate site, or archive.

strategy.decision: Stand up as a Stitch-sourced candidate; flag as scope expansion in audit.
strategy.why: Stitch surfaced this on its own (without being in 03-prototype-plan.md). It represents a possible identity-cluster expansion (publication + speaker presence + colophon) that the brownfield diagnose didn't surface.
strategy.shipped: No equivalent in v1 — v1 has no speaking page.
strategy.gap: v2 plan defines 8 surfaces; this is a 9th that's not a publication surface. Probably belongs on a separate site (ninochavez.co main, not the publication subdomain).
strategy.question: Is the publication v2's only scope, or is the identity cluster (Speaking, About, Colophon) part of v2's surface set?
